description_long: This house features a two-story structure with a brick lower level and a wooden upper level painted in yellow and green. The roof is a large, dark, shingled hip roof with a central chimney. The upper story is surrounded by a row of green-framed windows, while the lower story has brick walls with green-framed windows and a green door. A prominent green staircase with a railing leads up to the second floor, suggesting a split-level or raised design. Ivy or climbing plants are visible on the brick walls, adding a touch of greenery and character. The overall appearance is reminiscent of early 20th-century railway or signal houses, with utilitarian yet decorative details.
description: A two-story house with a brick base, yellow and green wooden upper level, hip roof, and exterior staircase. Green windows and doors, plus climbing ivy, give it a distinctive, historic look.
description_view_0: Side view showing the green staircase leading to the upper level, yellow siding, and brick lower story with green windows and ivy.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the main green door, central staircase, symmetrical window arrangement, and the hip roof with chimney.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with the staircase and railing, yellow upper siding, and brick lower level with two large green windows and ivy.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back door, two arched windows, and the continuation of the hip roof and brickwork.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry with green door at the base of a prominent exterior staircase, no porch, and minimal decorative elements.
